findings.title: No modal or overlay focus trap
findings.description: Overlays use display:flex and sometimes focus first field, but no focus trap, no inert on rest of page, no focus restoration on close.
findings.recommendation: Implement focus-trap helper; store/restore activeElement; use inert attribute.

findings.title: Full DOM rebuild for tables and unthrottled case filtering
findings.description: filterCases runs on every input event and rebuilds full tbody. No pagination, windowing, or virtual scroll.
findings.recommendation: Debounce filter input; add server-side paging or virtual list for large N.

findings.title: Pipeline stepper and flows are mouse-centric
findings.description: Pipeline steps are divs with click only; not in tab order. Tab bar lacks roving tabindex and Arrow key behavior.
findings.recommendation: Use button elements for pipeline steps; implement standard tab keyboard support.

findings.title: Mixed i18n and English-only accessible names
findings.description: Analysis icon buttons use hardcoded English aria-label while cases use translated titles.
findings.recommendation: Use t() for all icon button labels.

findings.title: Loading indicators missing for key async operations
findings.description: loadProjects, loadInputs, loadAnalysis, uploads, createProject lack loading states.
findings.recommendation: Disable actions and show spinner for all async operations.

findings.title: Wide tables may overflow small viewports
findings.description: data-table sections not wrapped in overflow-x:auto containers.

findings.title: Inputs tab and Manual QA copy gaps
findings.description: renderInputs only hides table when empty; i18n keys exist but unused. Manual stats has hardcoded English.
findings.recommendation: Show empty block using i18n keys; replace static manual-stats text.

findings.title: Side panel not exposed as dialog to AT
findings.description: detail-panel has no role=dialog, aria-modal, or labelledby.

findings.title: Document language default may not match content
findings.description: getLang() falls back to Korean when browser language unknown; HTML lang starts as en.
findings.recommendation: Default getLang to en when unknown; align documentElement.lang.

findings.title: Focus styles rely on border-color only
findings.description: CSS uses outline:none and replaces with border-color; may have insufficient focus visibility.
findings.recommendation: Add visible :focus-visible ring meeting contrast requirements.

overall_impression: Coherent dark theme, sensible breakpoints, hash routing, aria-selected on tabs, Escape handling. Main gaps: focus management for overlays, scalability of table rendering, keyboard-complete equivalents for custom controls.
